Eye of Innoruuk  
 

Lore Item Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +5 MANA: +55
SV MAGIC: +10
Effect: Chill Sight (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: WIZ
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Eye of Innoruuk
Lore Item Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +5 MANA: +55
SV MAGIC: +10
Effect: Chill Sight (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: WIZ
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Innoruuk's Favor
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:250 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:11249
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 05:30:53
Page Updated:Tue Apr 25th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 2,500pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Hate
NPC Name
an ashenbone broodmaster
Avatar of Abhorrence
Coercer T`vala
Grandmaster R`Tal
Lord of Ire
Lord of Loathing
Magi P`Tasa
Master of Spite
Mistress of Scorn

Plane of Hate 2.0
NPC Name
Vicar M`Kari

Plane of Hate B
NPC Name
a hideous rat
an eerie chest

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Nektulos Forest
Quest Name
Necromancer Epic: Scythe of the Shadowed Soul

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Hate

The eye is tradeable
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2015 at 2:16 PM Rating: Decent
Pasz
6 posts
I can confirm as of 3/8/2015 that the eye is still tradeable. It took me roughly 2 days to get it, I ran around the zone and cleared every hut with a named spawn point in it. I ended up getting it from Master of Spite, I saw him up the most out of all the mobs, got it on the third kill.
▲ Page top
The eye is tradeable
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2015 at 9:59 AM Rating: Decent
judus
Scholar
83 posts
Confirming also, dropped by an ashenbone broodmaster. One happy Necro, I was lucky first round of spawns.

# Nov 08 2013 at 1:05 PM Rating: Good
Tegs
8 posts
After several hours of going through the 11 camps on Vox with named that said dropped the Eye of Innoruuk I added a hideous rat out of boredom seems I was ahead of spawns. After 2 placeholders a hideous rat spawned and dropped the Eye of Innoruuk.

And to clarify from the posts before, it is Lore, tradeable.

SoE Logic
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2004 at 8:43 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591796514348
57 posts
I've figured this out finally.. Camped my ranger at Mistress of Scorn and got Eye of Innoruuk first kill. If u want SEoC make a necro ro wizard to camp it. If u want EoI then make a ranger. Havent tested it but im sure it fail proof. Going on 100 hours in hate and no SEoC anyone wanan trade The eye of inny for it :p
▲ Page top
SoE Logic
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2009 at 2:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592316920070
Scholar
25 posts
There may be something to this theory. I (ranger) have seen three of these in the last 45 mintutes, including back to back drops from the lich named. Not a SEOC to be seen.
▲ Page top
SoE Logic
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2009 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592316920070
Scholar
25 posts
Lol! up to five of these now, still no sign of a SEOC.
▲ Page top
Don't give up
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2004 at 12:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253564241
View User Forum
5 posts
Had the Eye drop off the Mistress of Scorn last night on TP. After weeks and weeks of farming Tier 1 mobs I had almost given up hope that this was dropping from them. I saw 3 chanter Vamp essences, two SEoC's, and several sets of Marsinger 1 drops in that amount of time (along with all the rods and swords that these named normally drop.) The Eye was far, far more rare than those others, but it's there.

Just camp the steps outside the Hand of Maestro and you've got easy access to 5 Tier 1 nameds (Broodmother, Mistress, Golem, Grandmaster, Magi P) and just a short walk from 4 others.
▲ Page top
Eye

▲ Page top
Clickable from inventory
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2004 at 1:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786693505
3 posts
Just in case anyone is not clear, this item is instant casting and clickable from inventory, but only if you're a wizard. Great for raiding wizards.
▲ Page top
RE: Clickable from inventory
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2005 at 2:02 AM Rating: Default
iganias
210 posts
how is it great for raiding?
▲ Page top
RE: Clickable from inventory
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2005 at 5:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342448401
View User Forum
Scholar
51 posts
It's great for raiding because it is an insta-clickie from inventory...thus making it quite a useful insta-clickie on raid mobs that dispel, without having to unequip something.
▲ Page top

What's the logic ?
QuoteReply
# May 27 2003 at 3:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750203849
View User Forum
17 posts
Flame disclaimer - Under no circumstances should this question be interpreted to mean that I think a wizard should not be allowed to use this item. This is not a rant, but a serious question.

Question - What's the logic behind not allowing a necromancer to use a necromancer epic related item? Why would any class not be allowed to use a usable item that belongs to their epic? Am I missing the role-play value behind this?

Supplemental comment - I wish I could ask the boys and 3 girls at Sony directly.


Fearfactor
56 Defiler, eci
▲ Page top
RE: What's the logic ?
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2005 at 9:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
What's the logic behind not allowing a necromancer to use a necromancer epic related item?

It's used in the recipe that Kazan is putting together.
▲ Page top
RE: What's the logic ?
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2003 at 12:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791444426
5 posts
Consider the Shadow Knight Epic...

One of the first items we have to aquire is a ghoulbane, which is a paladin only weapon.

Of course we then corrupt it for our own vile purposes...

Just an example.
▲ Page top
RE: What's the logic ?
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2003 at 1:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255933551
28 posts
same thing with that one quest sword from PoH (the one of the Dreadrot Knight) the weap itslef is SK/DE Inny only but the result is a Bard, Rang, Rogue Karana only item, Verant is just screwy lol
▲ Page top
RE: What's the logic ?
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2003 at 3:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761068725
8 posts
The logic is.. That item cant be used by whatever class.. its just meant that way.

Now mix it with a few others, a lil dash of magic and you turn and twist it into something new... Something YOU can use.

<<<< Why cant we use this ore to slash crap I mean it makes a sword in the end >>>>>
▲ Page top
Level
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2003 at 3:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772745569
21 posts
What lvl can i use the effect?
▲ Page top
well
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2003 at 12:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760063884
174 posts
definiteley should never go to a wizard. i mean if there is no necro on the raid or sumtin it woudl be cool to let a wizard use it.... but to hand over to a necro when one needs it...i would never expect a necro to take a piece from my epic so i wouldn't do the same... as for ripping off some guy in east coms and buying this for 150pp.. good deal but thats not rite.... shoudl never rip people off just because they r new..and if he got it from his friend... that means that the friend bsically blew 15k for givin it to him and him lettin it go for 250pp....
▲ Page top
One Very Happy Necro
QuoteReply
# Sep 25 2002 at 3:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965997183
Scholar
76 posts
I got mine after we killed Coercer T'vala the other night. She dropped the Insidious Robe and the eye. And being the only necro in the entire raid, I was totally stoaked because I finally got both of the hardest quest pieces to my epic quest - The Slime Blood Gloves of Cazic Thule and The Eye of Innoruuk.

By the way, I did see this eye sell for about 10K on the Innoruuk Server; so I think that the prices may have come down some.
